style: Cinematic basketball photography for a premium athletic training brand. Dark, moody, editorial. Deep navy (#021F51) and charcoal shadows with dramatic directional gym lighting and a single warm orange (#F47B20) accent highlight. High contrast, shallow depth of field, fine film grain, professional sports-campaign look. Faces obscured, turned away, in shadow, or motion-blurred. No identifiable individuals. No text, no logos, no watermarks, no brand marks on apparel.

images.subject: A young basketball player mid-dribble, low dramatic camera angle, hard side light, dust and atmosphere in the air.
An empty professional indoor basketball court, polished hardwood, moody overhead lighting, a single spotlight pool on the floor.
A basketball resting on hardwood beside bright orange training cones, top-down view, long dramatic shadows.
A shooting-form silhouette against a bright window backlight, arm extended at the moment of release.
Extreme close-up of hands gripping a worn leather basketball, sweat, tension, rim light along the fingers.
A tactics whiteboard covered in X's-and-O's basketball play diagrams, a basketball on a rack softly out of focus behind it.
A basketball court sideline at dusk: a bench, a gym bag, and a ball, with late warm light streaming through high windows.
A one-on-one basketball training drill, the coach's shadow guiding a player, sense of motion, intimate framing.
A line of basketball players running a footwork drill, strong depth of field, synchronized motion.
Conditioning and strength work near the basketball rim, dramatic backlight, silhouette and sweat.
A two-ball dribbling drill, heavy motion blur on the basketballs, focused low light.
An agility ladder and cone drill on hardwood, low camera angle, fast motion.
A hand pointing at a clipboard or whiteboard breakdown of a basketball play, focused desk light.
A basketball passing through a net, frozen mid-motion, backlit, water droplets in the air.
Basketball sneakers planting hard on hardwood, low angle, energetic sense of a sharp cut.
Empty bleachers and a basketball court seen from a high corner, moody, a single pool of light.
